title: Threads reading experience: list, detail, and article reader
description: Turn the Threads tab from a stub into a full Feedly-style reading flow. Users can browse story threads with cursor-based pagination, sort, and dismiss/restore; open a thread to see its hero image, rolling summary, known facts, and member articles; and swipe between threads. Tapping a member article opens a reusable native reader (ArticleDetailView) with auto mark-read, importance badge, topic chips, AI summary callout, and an in-app Safari view. ArticleDetailView is built as a standalone reusable view so future specs (Articles browse, Search) can adopt it without changes.
